question: Solana all time high by June 30?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for SOLUSDT between 21 Jan '25 12:00 and 30 Jun '25 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final “High” price that is higher than any previous Binance 1 minute candle's "High" price on any prior date. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the SOLUSDT "High" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT with “1m” and “Candles” selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOLUSDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
